Search the codebase at "c:\Users\Cristopher\OneDrive\Escritorio\math solver" for ALL places where Gemini AI responses containing LaTeX are parsed as JSON. I need to find every file that:

1. Uses `JSON.parse` on Gemini/AI response text that might contain LaTeX (backslash commands like \frac, \sqrt, etc.)
2. Has its own JSON parsing logic for AI responses (similar functions to parseGeminiJSON)
3. Generates content with LaTeX that gets stored in DB

Search in backend/src/ files specifically. Look
